Container.Name: vibe-kanban
Container.Overview: Vibe Kanban is an AI-first software development project management tool. It uses AI agents to help manage and track software development tasks. This container includes GitHub CLI, Docker CLI, and OpenAI Codex for a complete development environment. For detailed setup instructions, see: https://vibekanban.com/docs
Container.Requires: This container requires Docker socket mounting for Docker-in-Docker support and persistent storage for project data.

Config.Name: Port: Web UI
Config.Description: HTTP port for the Vibe Kanban web interface.

Config.Name: Path: Project Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Vibe Kanban data (config, database).

Config.Name: Path: Cache
Config.Description: Cache directory for Vibe Kanban.

Config.Name: Path: Worktrees
Config.Description: Temporary git worktree storage.

Config.Name: Path: Workspace
Config.Description: Main workspace directory for your projects.

Config.Name: Path: SSH Keys (RO)
Config.Description: SSH keys for git operations (read-only).

Config.Name: Path: GitConfig (RO)
Config.Description: Git configuration file (read-only).

Config.Name: Path: Codex Config
Config.Description: OpenAI Codex configuration directory.

Config.Name: Path: GitHub CLI Config
Config.Description: GitHub CLI configuration directory.

Config.Name: Path: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for Docker-in-Docker support.

Config.Name: Variable: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for the container. See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones#List

Config.Name: Variable: PORT
Config.Description: Port for Vibe Kanban to listen on (should match Container Port above).

Config.Name: Variable: HOST
Config.Description: Host address to bind to (0.0.0.0 for all interfaces).

Config.Name: --- Git Configuration ---
Config.Description: Git author information used for commits. Docs: https://vibekanban.com/docs

Config.Name: Variable: GIT_AUTHOR_NAME
Config.Description: Git author name for commits.

Config.Name: Variable: GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL
Config.Description: Git author email for commits.

Config.Name: Variable: GIT_COMMITTER_NAME
Config.Description: Git committer name for commits.

Config.Name: Variable: GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL
Config.Description: Git committer email for commits.

Config.Name: --- API Keys (Advanced) ---
Config.Description: Optional API keys. For security, use secrets or environment files in production. Docs: https://vibekanban.com/docs/self-hosting/environment-variables

Config.Name: Variable: GH_TOKEN
Config.Description: GitHub personal access token (alternative to GitHub CLI auth).

Config.Name: Variable: OPENAI_API_KEY
Config.Description: OpenAI API key for Codex and AI features.

Config.Name: --- Runtime Tools ---
Config.Description: Install additional tools at container startup. Available agents: claude, gemini, copilot, amp, cursor, opencode, droid, clauderouter, qwen. Available browsers: chromium, firefox, webkit. Available tools: vitest, jest, msw

Config.Name: Variable: RUNTIME_AGENTS
Config.Description: Additional coding agents to install (space-separated). e.g., claude gemini

Config.Name: Variable: RUNTIME_PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS
Config.Description: Playwright browsers to install (space-separated). e.g., chromium firefox

Config.Name: Variable: RUNTIME_TESTING_TOOLS
Config.Description: Testing tools to install (space-separated). e.g., vitest jest

Config.Name: --- User & Permissions (Advanced) ---
Config.Description: Advanced user and permission settings.

Config.Name: Variable: LOCAL_UID
Config.Description: UID to run the container process as (default: 99 for nobody user).

Config.Name: Variable: LOCAL_GID
Config.Description: GID to run the container process as (default: 100 for users group).
